title: Renewed Hormuz hostilities drive ECB rates rethink amid ‘extremely volatile’ outlook
summary_full: Several consecutive days of strikes exchanged between the U.S. and Iran have cast uncertainty on the European Central Bank's interest rate decision next week.
summary_public: Several consecutive days of strikes exchanged between the U.S. and Iran have cast uncertainty on the European Central Bank's interest rate decision next week.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: strikes exchanged between the U.S. and Iran have cast uncertainty
